textByHash.000a880c8799c8668342f87ec6b0e44c067be582: Hello, Robert. You've had quite the makeover.
textByHash.12e12baf7a5ac8c5fb197ae523c6bb0fd41fa9af: You I don't recognise. Who are you?
textByHash.151df7e26c334949b7add49d3ae0177240fc619f: Ah, I see you brought your friend with you. I'm surprised to see you here after all this time. Curious...
textByHash.28b76d2fe5bf8314b6674bf6b3362d0257530922: Your precious hero is gone! Your friends have abandoned you!
textByHash.378772714537ba4e2610c502dc54e22374635c0a: We dragonkin are not as flimsy as you. I'm afraid you failed.
textByHash.37d69972da83afbde6c592bb791baf97c3d5bd5f: The doors are unlocked! Release us!
textByHash.387a1d8e4c84e3473cff25b953a55d30abe19100: Is that so? Then tell me, Dallas Jones, what answers do you seek?
textByHash.440e89f5f4a353db372f3587ccb38b8cbea9faca: Yes, come on, Dragon Slayer. Let's see what you've got.
textByHash.48f8a8318a6a6ad7129f49c132c2092fceed177a: I suspected as much. However, it turned out quite well for me in the end. I have been sealed here for hundreds of years, alone and without disturbance. More than enough time for me to perfect our salvation.
textByHash.5f7016381b2660cba4f00c9fc5b4274ad0a0c1b4: The creature you call Elvarg was the first. An attempt to create a being which would crush humanity once and for all. She was a failure. Too weak. Pathetic.
textByHash.5f79fc6e803febb058153a4c8b64e6bc3b15bbde: An annoying setback. When you attacked, I had this place sealed, to keep our work safe. My people were to return after the attack and release me again.
textByHash.60624467da79c58065ad77d28b0310040e58e1a3: Not all of us. Only a few gave in to the anger of the curse. Only a few waged war on you. But you were not willing to distinguish. And now, neither am I.
textByHash.6efe2272526dbfda73f8439eeef130da24c19bc4: You gave her a name? I never bothered. She was nothing.
textByHash.7f36faae6309d7bf32957b5a86aa9e4f2a8d4d36: We moved on. We tried various other methods, all ending in disappointment. In the end, we came here. Our largest facility yet. Here we began work on what would become our masterpiece.
textByHash.8074baf87be2d6d73ead97a538a1099ede33aaac: I don't think you have a choice. Let me show you...
textByHash.866f4066ef323bdb2c0546382119eca9f2529dbe: After your failed attempt on my life, I realised that we were starting to lose the war against your kind. We needed to turn the tide. We needed a new weapon.
textByHash.885669be8964b5037f03f3049ca521b6941465ac: Yes. He has power that no other dragon has. The power to influence the minds of other dragons. Through him, an army will be raised. One that will annihilate humanity.
textByHash.aa0b2daf640652434c2d1c42a1613885ccbc12c6: Why? You attacked us. Tried to destroy us. You took away our homes, our people. Were we expected to stand by and watch?
textByHash.c4dabb134f0e9ed400d27e8ec436079a51bfc48d: Why do you persist? Can't you see you've already lost?
textByHash.c841f2a6f51d4d182196a0526728253102e9d72a: Humanity is a disease. You have just unleashed the cure.
textByHash.cb079cf48aeee53e647b26ebc72f5e42c73222a2: You should have stayed at home. You're not a warrior anymore.
textByHash.ce470bef8969848cf1e9de82f97ac2288c2aa6cf: You will now face the full might of my power!
textByHash.d95c90866115e74959c776fa500e59bb5a0c08ca: Enough of this! You've had your fun! But that fun is at an end!
textByHash.de593df0184d30be04121756b4b8af5fc5878f28: Elvarg? Crandor? These names mean nothing to me.
textByHash.f85913dece64c2c088987381400493391d68fb5b: Well look who it is. I see you're still alive.
